MiningSpeed.title: Mining speed
MiningSpeed.description: How quickly this creature can hit when mining.

SowingSpeed.title: Sowing speed
SowingSpeed.description: How quickly this creature can sow.

BuildingSpeed.title: Construction speed
BuildingSpeed.description: How quickly this creature can construct, repair or deconstruct things.

HealingSpeed.title: Healing speed
HealingSpeed.description: How quickly this creature can heal when tending.

Trading.title: Trading
Trading.description: How well this creature can trade with others to get a better deal.

MeleeSpeed.title: Melee speed
MeleeSpeed.description: How quickly this creature can hit when using a melee weapon.

RangedSpeed.title: Ranged speed
RangedSpeed.description: How quickly this creature can hit when using a ranged weapon.

RangedAccuracy.title: Ranged accuracy
RangedAccuracy.description: How accurate this creature is when firing projectiles.

MeleeAccuracy.title: Melee accuracy
MeleeAccuracy.description: How accurate this creature is when using a melee weapon.
